items.title: Influencer, humanitarian, AI fake: Untangling the Lily Jay Foundation

children.content: Receiving millions of views online, the Lily Jay Foundation claims to help children across the world. She was even given an award for her work. But what is real and what is AI-generated? ABC NEWS Verify investigates.

items.title: Australia's spy agency turns to Vogue to find recruits

items.title: How many gambling ads played during the Socceroos match?

children.content: There should be rules against jumping on the World Cup bandwagon to illustrate a political point, but the Socceroos' valiant effort against Egypt offers a timely real-world test.

items.title: 'The world lost him': Crowds gather in Iran to farewell body of assassinated supreme leader

children.content: Millions of Iranians have gathered in Tehran as the country begins a week of funeral ceremonies for former supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

image.altText: Crowds wearing black and waving flags gather outside a large building, decorated with a large banner of Ali Khamenei.

items.title: How the Trump era echoes the messy truth behind the founding of America

children.content: US Independence Day was never the simple morality tale Americans often tell themselves. Under Donald Trump the debate over its meaning is more politically charged than ever under.

articles.title: Are America's founding principles being challenged?

children.content: The United States is celebrating its 250th anniversary today. Let's take a closer look at the document that birthed the nation and where things stand now.

image.altText: A painting that depicts five men drafting the Declaration of Independence

items.title: Simon Carman's life before alleged murder of Thai teenager

children.content: Accused murderer Simon Peter Carman spent much of the past decade isolating himself from many of his friends and family in Australia. It's in his rented room in Thailand that local police allege a gruesome murder occurred.

items.title: In the iPad age, how has Play School stayed relevant to our kids?

children.content: Australian Story is given rare behind-the-scenes access to Play School as it celebrates 60 years on air. An intimate look at the creative process of the iconic children’s TV show that’s still guided by one golden rule.

items.title: Thunderbirds unlock Super Netball dynasty with unique coaching approach

items.title: Government rejects all UN recommendations on LGBTQIA+ rights

items.title: Robotic rescue mission underway to save space telescope falling to Earth
